Objective To review the research progress in transplantation of the skeletal muscle myoblast.
OBJECTIVE: To summarize the application of myoblast in skeletal muscle contraction and gene treatment research.
Both Genzyme and Medtronic officials say that the myoblast method is just a first stab at cell therapy for the heart.
Separately, Genvec has also been testing skeletal myoblast cell therapy in heart failure patients, recently completing a 28-patient-trial led by Arizona Heart Institute cardiologist Nabil Dib.
